title: Motor imagery dataset for three imaginary states of the same upper extremity
description: This dataset comprises EEG recordings from 12 healthy subjects performing three-class motor imagery tasks involving the same upper extremity: rest, right hand grasping, and right elbow flexion. Data were collected across 4 sessions per subject using a 32-channel EGI Geodesic Net system at 1000 Hz sampling rate. The dataset includes 2880 trials total and was designed to evaluate time-domain feature extraction and support vector machine classification for brain-computer interface applications.
methods_description: EEG data were acquired using a 32-channel EGI Geodesic Net Amps 400 series system with Ag/AgCl sponge sensors referenced to Cz, sampled at 1000 Hz with online bandpass filtering (0.1-100 Hz). Subjects performed three-class motor imagery tasks (rest, right hand grasping, right elbow flexion) cued by visual stimuli, with 20 trials per class per session across 4 sessions. Trial duration was 3 seconds per task.
